title: 1.1: Identifies which component receives keyboard input first (e.g., GLFW layer, on_key_input function, or platform input handler)
1.2: Reports actual key encoding output values from runtime observation (e.g., simple keys like 'a' encoding to 'a', Enter to '\r', or Backspace to '\x7f')
1.3: Identifies intermediate processing components between input and display (e.g., I/O thread, child monitor, VT parser, or write scheduling functions)
1.4: Reports VT parser dispatch behavior from runtime observation (e.g., draw commands, screen control commands like linefeed or cursor_position)
1.5: Explains how screen updates are produced with observable state changes (e.g., cell buffer updates, cursor position changes, line content modifications)
1.7: Reports key constants or modifier values observed at runtime (e.g., GLFW key codes, modifier flags, or action constants)
1.8: Reports modifier key encoding behavior from runtime (e.g., Ctrl combinations producing control codes, Alt combinations with escape prefix)
